documentation.description:
COSE (RFC 9052/9053) core types and constants for Ada/SPARK.

This root package defines the algorithm identifiers, header map
type, message record types, and buffer utilities used by all
child packages (COSE.Headers, COSE.Mac0, COSE.Sign1, etc.).

No heap allocation.  All buffers are bounded stack arrays.

simple_types.name: Algorithm_Id
simple_types.code:
type Algorithm_Id is
  (Alg_HS256,
   Alg_HS512,
   Alg_EdDSA,
   Alg_ES256,
   Alg_ChaCha20_Poly,
   Alg_None);

simple_types.name: COSE_Status
simple_types.code:
type COSE_Status is
  (COSE_OK,
   COSE_Err_Invalid_Algorithm,
   COSE_Err_Buffer_Too_Small,
   COSE_Err_Invalid_Message,
   COSE_Err_Verification_Failed,
   COSE_Err_CBOR_Encode,
   COSE_Err_CBOR_Decode,
   COSE_Err_Missing_Header,
   …,
   COSE_Err_Decryption_Failed);

array_types.name: Recipient_Array
array_types.code: type Recipient_Array is array (Recipient_Index) of COSE_Recipient;

array_types.name: Signer_Array
array_types.code: type Signer_Array is array (Signer_Index) of COSE_Signer;

record_types.name: COSE_Encrypt0_Message
COSE_Encrypt_Message
COSE_Mac0_Message
COSE_Mac_Message
COSE_Recipient
COSE_Sign1_Message
COSE_Sign_Message
COSE_Signer
Header_Map
Write_Buffer

documentation.description: Protected header serialized size. {1: 5} = 3 bytes CBOR.
Ed25519 = 64 bytes, ECDSA P-256 = 64 bytes, with headroom.
HMAC tag or signature output max length.

subprograms.name: Append
